User guide
==========

This guide explains the key concepts of the ``lib-anim`` API. Each section
focuses on one aspect of the animation workflow and provides practical
implementation tips along with short code snippets. The goal is to give you
a clear mental model of how the pieces fit together — so that you spend your
time on the animation itself, not on the plumbing.

.. toctree::
  windows
  canva
  information
  2D animations
